summary_candidates: Machine learning and data-focused professional with a background in analyzing complex technical systems and structured measurement data.
Hands-on experience with Python, TensorFlow, statistics, computer vision, and end-to-end project work from data preparation to model evaluation.
Particularly motivated by applied AI roles in industrial, medical, and high-impact technical environments.
Strong at translating ambiguous technical problems into structured analyses, reproducible workflows, and clear documentation.

bullets: Analyzed complex technical systems and test data to identify anomalies, root causes, and improvement opportunities.
Worked with structured measurement data, quality-relevant findings, and technical documentation in an engineering context.
Communicated technical results clearly across stakeholders and contributed to reliable decision support.

education.degree: M.Sc. / continuing qualification in data-related field

projects.name: Emotion Detection with Custom CNN
projects.subtitle: Real-time facial emotion recognition
description: Built a custom CNN pipeline for facial emotion recognition using Python, TensorFlow, and OpenCV.
Implemented data preprocessing, model training, evaluation, and real-time inference workflow.
Packaged the project with documentation and demo material for portfolio presentation.

projects.name: Application Automation Pipeline
projects.subtitle: Structured job application workflow tooling
description: Developed scripts and workflow concepts for automating repetitive parts of job search and application preparation.
Combined structured data handling, document generation, and process optimization ideas.
Focused on reproducibility, time savings, and scalable personalization.
